projects.pageDescription: View and manage created or onboarded projects
projects.noProjectsDescription: Create a brand-new project, or onboard an existing project for management.
projects.loadFailed: Failed to load project list. Please try again later.
projects.detailDescription: Manage the project's application services, deployments, environments, and notification integrations
projects.deploymentSectionDescription: Manage the project's application services and deployment workflow
projects.integrationSectionDescription: Configure runtime environments and external notification integrations

projects.applicationsPanelDescription: Applications deployed under this project and the services they contain
projects.deploymentPanelDescription: Recent deployment records, from code pushes or manual triggers
projects.noResourceCopyEntry: No Resource copy takeover entry yet

projects.resourceLoadError: Failed to load resource list. Please try again later.
projects.noDeploymentsCta: No deployments yet — trigger your first deploy
projects.bindResourcesHintV2: After binding resource instances to an environment, env vars are auto-generated from each resource type's envTemplate at deploy time. Other resources (sites/secrets/etc.) are associated for organization only and do NOT affect deployment variables.

projects.bindGroupCategoricalHint: associated for organization; NOT written to .env
projects.envDetailNoServers: No servers bound to this environment
projects.envVarsPlainHint: Plain vars (non-sensitive, e.g. NODE_ENV=production). Use secret vars for sensitive values.
projects.envVarsInvalidKeyHint: Some variable names are invalid (must be uppercase letters/underscores/digits, e.g. NODE_ENV). Fix them before saving.
projects.envVarsSecretHint: Injected from Key Center at deploy; values are never shown here.
projects.envVarsSecretEmpty: No secrets for this environment; manage via the link.
projects.runInjectedKeysHint: The following variables are written at deploy time (values redacted)
projects.runInjectedKeysEmpty: No environment variables written in this deployment
projects.runInjectSkipped: ⚠ This deployment has no env-write step (injection was skipped)

executionPolicies.quickHelpSummary: Execution policies = allow/block regex templates for server commands. They decide whether a command may run, not when it runs.

auth.passwordStrengthHint: At least 6 characters; mixing letters and numbers is recommended

home.heroSubtitle: The control plane for full-stack projects: project creation and onboarding, resource requests and approvals, sites and CDN, monitoring and alerts, logs, and execution governance

projectWizard.title: Project Creation Wizard
projectWizard.description: Create new projects or onboard existing ones via a wizard, configuring sub-projects, feature modules, and resources

resourceApproval.title: Resource Requests & Approvals
resourceApproval.description: Request project resources such as databases, Redis, and ports; delivered and registered as instances after approval

siteCdn.title: Sites & CDN
siteCdn.description: Manage domains, TLS certificates, and reverse proxies; onboard CDN and purge caches

monitoring.title: Monitoring & Alerts
monitoring.description: Configure alert rules and notification channels, and track alert events and service SLOs

logs.title: Log Center
logs.description: Log archiving, querying, and live tail, with redaction policies and retention cleanup

governance.title: Execution Governance
governance.description: Govern task queues, workers, and remote sessions, with fully auditable and traceable operations

home.heroTitle: Ship your full-stack project, all in one place
